'''SedriMotors Limited''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-allied company founded by the [[Sedrian]]s. Considered to be the most successful [[Sedrian]] company, SedriMotors specialized in aquatic craft. It was known to equip its vehicles with exotic propulsion systems such as [[hydro-jet]]s and [[hover propulsion drive]]s. SedriMotors developed the [[Amphibion]] aquatic [[Soldier/Legends|troop]] transport, used by the Republic during the [[Battle of Calamari]].

==History==
The [[Sedrian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] evolved on the [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]]<ref name="G4">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref> of [[Periphery/Legends|The Periphery]].<ref name="SS">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref> They remained undiscovered by the spacefaring species up until the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After being [[Battle of Fitsay|attacked]] by forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and helped by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], the Sedrians became members of the Alliance<ref name="BGS">''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]''</ref> and later of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Although their technology lagged far behind of the standard of the [[galactic community]], the Sedrians soon made spectacular advances, particularly in both submarine and surface transport. Soon, the Sedrians could contribute to their allies with their machinery.<ref name="DE" />

The Sedrians created several manufacturing companies, with SedriMotors Ltd. being considered the most successful of these. This concern manufactured aquatic vehicles.<ref name="EV" /> Created in times of the Alliance,<ref name="EVAE">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''; [[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''</ref> SedriMotors was later directly associated with the New Republic. SedriMotors used uncommon propulsion systems, including [[hydro-jet]]s and [[hover propulsion drive]]s,<ref name="EV" /> even if these drives were considered obsolete by their time.<ref name="AE">''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''</ref>

==Products==
[[File:Amphibian_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|220px|An Amphibion]]
SedriMotors manufactured several military vehicles, including the [[deep-water combat pod]]<ref name="EV" /> and the Republic [[Amphibion]].<ref name="all">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''; [[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]; [[Arms & Equipment Guide]]; [[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> The Amphibion was a [[Soldier/Legends|troop]] transport<ref name="EVNV">''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''; [[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> that was mass-produced<ref name="EV" /> following the specifications of the Republic. The Republic had asked SedriMotors for a cheap vehicle<ref name="DE" /> and SedriMotors answered with this lightly-armored,<ref name="EV" /> lightly-armed<ref name="DE" /> but fast, silent<ref name="DEEV">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''; [[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> and versatile<ref name="EVNV" /> [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]].<ref name="AE" /> The Alliance and later the Republic used groups of SedriMotors Amphibions in combination with other vehicles in their activities.<ref name="EV" /> The Amphibion was extensively<ref name="NV">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref> used by the Republic forces during the [[Battle of Calamari]], in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].<ref name="DEEV" />

==Behind the scenes==
SedriMotors Limited was first mentioned in ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', giving a name to the company that created the vehicle seen in the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' comic-book series. This linked the Amphibion to the previously-known Sedrian species seen in the [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure ''[[Battle for the Golden Sun]]''.
